pages.text: Drop a catalyst item into a placed Slime Milk source to upgrade it. Stack several to turn one source into a steady, hands-off supply.$(br2)Look at a source with Jade to see its remaining spawns and which upgrades it carries.
Adds more spawns before the source drains - keep feeding it to extend a source's life.
Shortens the wait between spawns, so the source produces faster.
Spawns more slimes per spawn - bigger batches each time.
The source never runs dry. Crafted from Bountiful Catalysts - the top of the upgrade ladder.
